гҖҖгҖҖAlone on Halloween| a young woman finds a mysterious VHS tape on her doorstep-a tape that shows a series of gruesome and ghastly tales that appear to be all too real. But these terrifying glimpses of damned souls are not the only horrors that stalk her. A sinister| pumpkin-faced killer is using the videotape as a portal into our reality; and if he makes it through| this twisted trickster seeks only one "treat": blood@hdgaoqing.com
